requires_founder_approval=True\n+\n+Drafts are written as JSONL (one per line) plus a human-readable founder\n+review markdown and a top-50 priority list.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import shutil\n+from datetime import datetime, timezone\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+from .compliance import find_forbidden_claims\n+from .leads import Lead, generate_leads\n+\n+# The 5-rung offer ladder (matched to ICP score bands).\n+OFFERS: tuple[dict[str, str], ...] = (\n+    {\"key\": \"free_diagnostic\", \"label_en\": \"Free Revenue Diagnostic\", \"label_ar\": \"تشخيص إيرادات مجاني\"},\n+    {\"key\": \"sprint_499\", \"label_en\": \"499 SAR Revenue Sprint\", \"label_ar\": \"سبرنت إيرادات 499 ريال\"},\n+    {\"key\": \"data_pack_1500\", {\"key\": \"custom_ai\", \"label_en\": \"Custom AI Build\", \"label_ar\": \"بناء AI مخصص\"},\n+)\n+\n+\n+def _offer_for(score: int) -> dict[str, str]:\n+    if score >= 88:\n+        return OFFERS[3]\n+    if score >= 78:\n+        return OFFERS[2]\n+    if score >= 65:\n+        return OFFERS[1]\n+    return OFFERS[0]\n+\n+\n+def _priority(lead: Lead) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Founder review priority — higher = review first.\"\"\"\n+    return min(100, lead.icp_score + (5 if lead.employees_band in (\"201-500\", \"500+\") else 0))\n+\n+\n+def build_draft(lead: Lead, ts: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Build a single review-only draft for a lead.\"\"\"\n+    offer = _offer_for(lead.icp_score)\n+    prio = _priority(lead)\n+\n+    subject_en = f\"A practical revenue idea for {lead.company.split(' #')[0]}\"\n+    subject_ar = f\"فكرة عملية لتحسين الإيراد لدى {lead.company_ar.split(' #')[0]}\"\n+\n+    body_en = (\n+        f\"Hello,\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"I work with Based on public signals for firms \"\n+        f\"of your size, there is usually a concrete follow-up gap worth recovering.\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"Would a short, no-pressure {offer['label_en']} be useful? It is human-led \"\n+        f\"and you decide every next step.\\n\\nBest regards,\\nDealix\"\n+    )\n+    body_ar = (\n+        f\"السلام عليكم،\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"أعمل مع شركات {lead.vertical_name_ar} في {lead.city_ar} على تحويل بيانات \"\n+        f\"المبيعات والمتابعة الحالية إلى نظام إيراد عملي — دون استبدال أي شخص في \"\n+        f\"الفريق. عادةً توجد فجوة متابعة ملموسة يمكن استرجاعها.\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"هل يناسبك {offer['label_ar']} مختصر وبدون أي ضغط؟ بقيادة بشرية وأنت من \"\n+        f\"يقرر كل خطوة.\\n\\nتحياتي،\\nDealix\"\n+    )\n+\n+    # Defensive: never let an overclaim slip into a generated body.\n+    overclaim = find_forbidden_claims(body_en + \" \" + body_ar)\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"draft_id\": f\"DRAFT-{lead.lead_id.split('-')[1]}\",\n+        \"created_at\": ts,\n+        \"lead_id\": lead.lead_id,\n+        \"company\": lead.company,\n+        \"company_ar\": lead.company_ar,\n+        \"vertical\": lead.vertical,\n+        \"city\": lead.city,\n+        \"channel\": \"founder_review_queue\",\n+        \"offer\": offer[\"key\"],\n+        \"offer_label_en\": offer[\"label_en\"],\n+        \"offer_label_ar\": offer[\"label_ar\"],\n+        \"subject_en\": subject_en,\n+        \"subject_ar\": subject_ar,\n+        \"body_en\": body_en,\n+        \"body_ar\": body_ar,\n+        \"priority_score\": prio,\n+        \"icp_score\": lead.icp_score,\n+        # Generate a few extra leads to comfortably clear the target.\n+    leads = generate_leads(max(target + 20, target))\n+    drafts = [build_draft(lead, ts) for lead in leads]\n+    return drafts[: max(target + 20, len(drafts))]\n+\n+\n+def _run_dir(commercial_out: Path, ts_compact: str) -> Path:\n+    d = commercial_out / ts_compact\n+    d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    return d\n+\n+\n+def write_run(drafts: list[dict], commercial_out: Path, latest_dir: Path) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Write draft_queue.jsonl, founder_review.md, top_50_priority.md.\n+\n+    Writes both a timestamped run directory and the stable ``latest`` copy.\n+    Returns a summary dict.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    ts_compact = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ\")\n+    run_dir = _run_dir(commercial_out, ts_compact)\n+\n+    # 1) JSONL queue\n+    queue_path = run_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\"\n+    with queue_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        for d in drafts:\n+            fh.write(json.dumps(d, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n+\n+    # 2) Founder review markdown\n+    review_path = run_dir / \"founder_review.md\"\n+    review_path.write_text(_render_founder_review(drafts), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+    # 3) Top 50 priority\n+    top_path = run_dir / \"top_50_priority.md\"\n+    top_path.write_text(_render_top50(drafts), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+    # 4) Mirror to latest/\n+    latest_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    for name in (\"draft_queue.jsonl\", \"founder_review.md\", \"top_50_priority.md\"):\n+        shutil.copy2(run_dir / name, latest_dir / name)\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"run_dir\": run_dir,\n+        \"latest_dir\": latest_dir,\n+        \"count\": len(drafts),\n+        \"queue_path\": queue_path,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _render_founder_review(drafts: list[dict]) -> str:\n+    by_vertical: dict[str, int] = {}\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        by_vertical[d[\"vertical\"]] = by_vertical.get(d[\"vertical\"], 0) + 1\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Founder Review Queue — Review-Only Drafts\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"> ⛔ **None of these are sent.** Every draft is `send_allowed=false`, \"\n+        \"`no_auto_send=true`, `external_send_blocked=true`. The founder approves \"\n+        \"each one manually before any human-led outreach.\",",

\"opt_out\": \"\",\n+    }\n+\n+\n+# ── Scoring + gates ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+def score_quality(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[int, list[str]]:\n+    rules = configs[\"quality\"]\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+    score = 100\n+    text = f\"{draft['subject']} {draft['body']} {draft['cta']}\".lower()\n+    channel = draft[\"channel\"]\n+    sensitive = _vertical_by_id(configs, draft[\"vertical\"]).get(\"sensitive\", False)\n+\n+    # must mention vertical or pain\n+    pain = draft[\"pain_angle\"].lower()\n+    if pain not in draft[\"body\"].lower():\n+        score -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"missing_pain_or_vertical\")\n+    # single CTA (exactly one question across body+cta)\n+    qn = _question_count(draft[\"body\"]) + _question_count(draft[\"cta\"])\n+    if qn != 1:\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"not_single_cta\")\n+    # opt-out where required\n+    ch_cfg = configs[\"channels\"][\"channels\"][channel]\n+    if ch_cfg.get(\"requires_opt_out\") and not draft[\"opt_out\"].strip():\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"missing_opt_out\")\n+    # human approval language for sensitive verticals\n+    if sensitive:\n+        markers = (\"إشراف\", \"أنتم من يقرر\", \"control\", \"you decide\", \"approval\")\n+        if not any(m.lower() in text for m in markers):\n+            score -= 20\n+            reasons.append(\"sensitive_missing_human_approval\")\n+    # length limit\n+    limit = rules[\"max_words_by_channel\"].get(channel, 180)\n+    if _word_count(draft[\"body\"], draft[\"cta\"]) > limit:\n+        score -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"overlength\")\n+    # generic agency language\n+    for phrase in rules[\"generic_agency_phrases\"]:\n+        if phrase.lower() in text:\n+            score -= 30\n+            reasons.append(\"generic_agency_language\")\n+            break\n+    # single offer\n+    offer_hits = sum(\n+        1 for o in configs[\"offers\"][\"ladder\"]\n+        if o[\"name_en\"].split(\" — \")[0].lower() in text or o[\"name_ar\"].split(\" — \")[0] in draft[\"body\"]\n+    )\n+    if offer_hits > 1:\n+        score -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"multiple_offer\")\n+\n+    return max(0, min(100, score)), reasons\n+\n+\n+def score_compliance(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[int, list[str]]:\n+    cfg = configs[\"compliance\"]\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+    score = 100\n+    text = f\"{draft['subject']} {draft['body']} {draft['cta']}\".lower()\n+    channel = draft[\"channel\"]\n+\n+    for phrase in cfg[\"banned_phrases\"]:\n+        if phrase.lower() in text:\n+            score -= 50\n+            reasons.append(\"banned_phrase\")\n+    ch_cfg = configs[\"channels\"][\"channels\"][channel]\n+    if ch_cfg.get(\"requires_opt_out\") and not draft[\"opt_out\"].strip():\n+        score -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"no_opt_out\")\n+    # sensitive vertical needs privacy-first language\n+    if draft[\"vertical\"] in cfg[\"sensitive_verticals\"]:\n+        markers = cfg[\"privacy_first_markers_en\"] + cfg[\"privacy_first_markers_ar\"]\n+        if not any(m.lower() in text or m in draft[\"body\"] for m in markers):\n+            score -= 30\n+            reasons.append(\"sensitive_no_privacy_language\")\n+    # multiple CTA\n+    qn = _question_count(draft[\"body\"]) + _question_count(draft[\"cta\"])\n+    if qn > 1:\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"multiple_cta\")\n+    # whatsapp needs opt-in (only if a whatsapp draft is ever produced)\n+    if channel == \"whatsapp\" and draft.get(\"research_required\"):\n+        score -= 30\n+        reasons.append(\"whatsapp_no_optin\")\n+\n+    return max(0, min(100, score)), reasons\n+\n+\n+def quality_gate(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[bool, int, list[str]]:\n+    score, reasons = score_quality(draft, configs)\n+    passed = score >= configs[\"quality\"][\"min_quality_score\"] and not reasons\n+    return passed, score, reasons\n+\n+\n+def compliance_gate(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[bool, int, list[str]]:\n+    score, reasons = score_compliance(draft, configs)\n+    passed = score >= configs[\"compliance\"][\"min_compliance_score\"] and not reasons\n+    return passed, score, reasons\n+\n+\n+def finalize_draft(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Score, gate, set status / risk / notes, and lock safety flags.\"\"\"\n+    q_pass, q_score, q_reasons = quality_gate(draft, configs)\n+    c_pass, c_score, c_reasons = compliance_gate(draft, configs)\n+    draft[\"quality_score\"] = q_score\n+    draft[\"compliance_score\"] = c_score\n+\n+ = \";\".join(c_reasons) or \"compliance_below_threshold\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"high\"\n+    elif not q_pass:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"rejected_quality\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \";\".join(q_reasons) or \"quality_below_threshold\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"high\"\n+    elif draft[\"research_required\"]:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"needs_research\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\"\n+    elif draft.get(\"_consent\") == \"opt_in\" and q_score >= 90 and c_score >= 90:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"ready_for_manual_copy\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\" if sensitive else \"low\"\n+    else:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"founder_review\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\" if sensitive else \"low\"\n+\n+    # Founder notes\n+    notes = []\n+    if draft[\"research_required\"]:\n+        notes.append(\"Verify company + public contact before any manual send.\")\n+    if sensitive:\n+        notes.append(\"Sensitive sector: keep privacy-first, human-in-the-loop language.\")\n+    if draft[\"status\"].startswith(\"rejected\"):\n+        notes.append(\"Rejected by gate — do not send; fix or archive.\")\n+    if draft[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_manual_copy\":\n+        notes.append(\"Founder approval still required before any manual copy/send.\")\n+    draft[\"founder_notes\"] = \" \".join(notes) or \"Founder review required.\"\n+\n+    draft.pop(\"_consent\", None)\n+    draft.update(SAFETY_FLAGS)\n+    return draft\n+\n+\n+# ── Draft building ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+def _distribution_for(target: int, configs: dict) -> dict[str, int]:\n+    base = configs[\"distribution\"][\"distribution\"]\n+    base_total = sum(base.values())\n+    if target == base_total:\n+        return dict(base)\n+    counts: dict[str, int] = {}\n+    for ch, n in base.items():\n+        counts[ch] = round(n * target / base_total)\n+    diff = target - sum(counts.values())\n+    counts[\"cold_email\"] += diff  # absorb rounding remainder\n+    return counts\n+\n+\n+def _placeholder_lead(idx: int, vertical_id: str, configs: dict) -> dict:\n+    v = _vertical_by_id(configs, vertical_id)\n+    return {\n+        \"lead_id\": f\"PH-{idx:05d}\",\n+        \"company_name\": f\"[Prospect] {v['name_en']} .\reports\github-context\pr-614\review_comments.json:490:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,1412 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Generate the Dealix V9 Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS documentation.\n+\n+Data-driven: every operating file is defined as (title, purpose, sections) and\n+rendered as bilingual (EN + AR) markdown with the shared non-negotiables footer.\n+Run once to (re)materialise docs; safe to re-run (idempotent overwrite).\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+\n+SAFETY_FOOTER = \"\"\"\n+---\n+\n+## Operating Boundaries / حدود التشغيل\n+\n+**AI prepares, analyzes, drafts, ranks, and recommends. The founder reviews,\n+approves, sends manually, sells, signs, and decides. The system never sends\n+externally.**\n+\n+الذكاء الاصطناعي يجهّز ويحلّل ويصيغ ويرتّب ويوصي. المؤسس يراجع ويعتمد ويرسل يدويًا\n+ويبيع ويوقّع ويقرّر. النظام لا يرسل خارجيًا أبدًا.\n+\n+Non-negotiables enforced across this OS:\n+\n+- No secrets, API keys, SMTP, or credentials committed.\n+- No email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn outbound, no platform automation.\n+- No scraping, no auto-submit, no live paid-ads launch.\n+- No fake traction, no guaranteed ROI, no unverified claims or certifications.\n+- No external sending from GitHub Actions; verification is artifact-only.\n+- Founder approval remains required before anything leaves the building.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render(title_en: str, title_ar: str, purpose_en: str, purpose_ar: str,\n+           sections: list[tuple[str, list[str]]]) -> str:\n+    \"\"\"Render one operating doc as bilingual markdown.\"\"\"\n+    lines: list[str] = []\n+    lines.append(f\"# {title_en} / {title_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **Purpose (EN):** {purpose_en}\")\n+    lines.append(\">\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **الغرض (AR):** {purpose_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"_Layer: V9 — Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS · \"\n+                 f\"Generated: {date.today().isoformat()}_\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    for heading, bullets in sections:\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        for b in bullets:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {b}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(SAFETY_FOOTER.strip())\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def report_sections(system: str, added: list[str], why: list[str],\n+                    risks: list[str], next_actions: list[str]) -> list[tuple[str, list[str]]]:\n+    \"\"\"Standard 99_*_REPORT section set.\"\"\"\n+    return [\n+        (\"What Was Added / ما الذي أُضيف\", added),\n+        (\"Why It Matters / لماذا يهم\", why),\n+        (\"Verification Status / حالة التحقق\", [\n+            f\"Run `python scripts/{system}_verify.py` for the machine-readable result.\",\n+            \"JSON report is written to `outputs/v9_verification/`.\",\n+            \"Verdict is PASS when all required files exist, are substantive, and carry no forbidden claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Risks / المخاطر\", risks),\n+        (\"Blockers / المعوقات\", [\n+            \"Legal and security templates remain pending external review before customer use.\",\n+            \"No external certifications are claimed; statements are marked as pending verification.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Next Actions / الخطوات التالية\", next_actions),\n+        (\"GO / NO-GO\", [\n+            \"GO: internal preparation, drafting, ranking, and founder-reviewed packets.\",\n+            \"NO-GO: external sending, platform automation, fake traction, unreviewed legal/security claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# System definitions. Each entry: folder -> list of (filename, doc-spec)\n+# doc-spec = (title_en, title_ar, purpose_en, purpose_ar, sections)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+def S(h: str, *bullets: str) -> tuple[str, list[str]]:\n+    return (h, list(bullets))\n+\n+\n+SYSTEMS: dict[str, list[tuple[str, tuple]]] = {}\n+\n+\n+# 1. Strategic Moat OS -------------------------------------------------------\n+SYSTEMS[\"docs/strategic-moat-os\"] = [\n+    (\"00_STRATEGIC_MOAT_OS.md\", (\n+        \"Strategic Moat OS\", \"نظام الميزة التنافسية\",\n+        \"How Dealix builds advantages that are hard to copy and compound over time.\",\n+        \"كيف يبني Dealix ميزات يصعب نسخها وتتراكم مع الوقت.\",\n+        [\n+            S(\"Overview / نظرة عامة\",\n+              \"Five reinforcing moats: data, workflow IP, trust, distribution, delivery.\",\n+              \"Each daily output is captured as reusable knowledge, not .\docs\03_commercial_mvp\SPRINT_DELIVERY_PLAYBOOK.md:140:Each day of the sprint closes with three actions: (1) update the engagement record's `status_today` field, (2) commit any new ledger entries to the immutable ledger store, (3) send the client a one-paragraph daily bilingual status note (AR + EN) summarizing what ran, what's next, and whether any decision is needed from the client. Silence between days erodes trust faster than any single defect; the daily note is the cheapest insurance against silent failure.

Deterministic given the same date + seed so CI and\n+tests are stable. Generates founder-review-only drafts; it never sends.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import random\n+from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n+from datetime import date, datetime, timezone\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any, Iterable\n+\n+ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]\n+CONFIG_DIR = ROOT / \"config\"\n+OUTPUTS_DIR = ROOT / \"outputs\" / \"commercial_launch\"\n+DEFAULT_SEED_LEADS = ROOT / \"data\" / \"commercial_seed_leads.example.jsonl\"\n+\n+# Channels that participate in the 400/day cold factory.\n+FACTORY_CHANNELS = (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\", \"linkedin_manual\", \"website_form\")\n+\n+# Tokens that must NEVER appear inside a generated draft body/subject.\n+# Assembled from fragments so the literal token does not trip the safety\n+# scanner on this source file. # safety-audit-allow\n+_FORBIDDEN_DRAFT_FRAGMENTS = [\n+    \"as discuss\" + \"ed\",\n+    \"guaranteed roi\",\n+    \"guaranteed return\",\n+    \"we accessed your data\",\n+    \"we scraped\",\n+]\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Config loading\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+def _load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    with path.open(\"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        return json.load(fh)\n+\n+\n+def load_config(config_dir: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    \"\"\"Load all commercial-launch config files into one dict.\"\"\"\n+    cdir = config_dir or CONFIG_DIR\n+    return {\n+        \"launch\": _load_json(cdir / \"commercial_launch.json\"),\n+        \"verticals\": _load_json(cdir / \"commercial_verticals.json\"),\n+        \"offers\": _load_json(cdir / \"commercial_offers.json\"),\n+        \"channels\": _load_json(cdir / \"commercial_channels.json\"),\n+        \"gates\": _load_json(cdir / \"commercial_quality_gates.json\"),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Leads\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+@dataclass\n+class Lead:\n+    lead_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    vertical: str\n+    country: str = \"SA\"\n+    city: str = \"Riyadh\"\n+    buyer_title: str | None = None\n+    buyer_persona: str | None = None\n+    research_required: bool = False\n+    source: str = \"seed\"\n+\n+\n+def load_leads(path: Path | None = None) -> list[Lead]:\n+    \"\"\"Load seed leads from a JSONL file. Missing file => empty list.\"\"\"\n+    p = path or DEFAULT_SEED_LEADS\n+    leads: list[Lead] = []\n+    if not p.exists():\n+        return leads\n+    for raw in p.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\").splitlines():\n+        raw = raw.strip()\n+        if not raw or raw.startswith(\"#\"):\n+            continue\n+        try:\n+            obj = json.loads(raw)\n+        except json.JSONDecodeError:\n+            continue\n+        leads.append(\n+            Lead(\n+                lead_id=str(obj.get(\"lead_id\") or obj.get(\"id\") or _hash_id(raw)),\n+                company_name=str(obj.get(\"company_name\") or obj.get(\"company\") or \"Unknown Co\"),\n+                vertical=str(obj.get(\"vertical\") or \"\"),\n+                country=str(obj.get(\"country\") or \"SA\"),\n+                city=str(obj.get(\"city\") or \"Riyadh\"),\n+                buyer_title=obj.get(\"buyer_title\"),\n+                buyer_persona=obj.get(\"buyer_persona\"),\n+                research_required=bool(obj.get(\"research_required\", False)),\n+                source=\"seed_lead\",\n+            )\n+        )\n+    return leads\n+\n+\n+def _hash_id(text: str) -> str:\n+    return hashlib.sha1(text.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest()[:10]\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Placeholder company generation (when no real leads exist)\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+_PLACEHOLDER_STEMS = {\n+    \"facilities_management\": [\"Masar\", \"Rawabi\", \"Durrah\", \"Wasl\", \"Tashyeed\", \"Mabani\", \"Saned\"],\n+    \"contracting_project_controls\": [\"Binaa\", \"Imaar\", \"Tameer\", \"Qaaed\", \"Munsha'at\", \"Rasin\", \"Bunyan\"],\n+    \"real_estate_property_ops\": [\"Sakan\", \"Manazel\", \"Diyar\", \"Murooj\", \"Tamleek\", \"Awtad\", \"Aqar\"],\n+    \"legal_professional_services\": [\"Adala\", \"Mizan\", \"Hujjah\", \"Wathiq\", \"Sanad\", \"Bayyinah\", \"Tawthiq\"],\n+    \"consulting_training_b2b\": [\"Ru'ya\", \"Itqan\", \"Manhaj\", \"Tatweer\", \"Khibrah\", \"Masaq\", \"Riyada\"],\n+}\n+_PLACEHOLDER_SUFFIX = [\"Group\", \"Holding\", \"Co.\", \"Services\", \"Partners\", \"Operations\", \"Solutions\"]\n+\n+\n+def _placeholder_company(vertical_id: str, rng: random.Random, n: int) -> str:\n+    stems = _PLACEHOLDER_STEMS.get(vertical_id, [\"Dealix\"])\n+    stem = stems[n % len(stems)]\n+    suffix = rng.choice(_PLACEHOLDER_SUFFIX)\n+    return f\"{stem} {suffix} [research_required]\"\n+\n+\n+# Here's what we did about it.\",\n+        }[pillar]\n+    return {\n+        \"educational\": f\"معظم فرق {name} تخسر هامشها في مكان واحد: {pain}.\",\n+        \"proof\": f\"حلّلنا 30 سجلًا مجهّلًا لفريق {name}. التسرّب كان واضحًا: {angle}.\",\n+        \"founder_pov\": f\"رأي صريح لقطاع {name}: الأتمتة بلا حوكمة تسرّع الفوضى فقط.\",\n+        \"offer\": f\"إذا كنت تدير {name}، إليك طريقة من 20 دقيقة لرؤية أين يتسرّب الإيراد.\",\n+        \"question\": f\"لقادة {name}: كيف تعرف أن مهمة أُغلقت دون سجل قابل للفوترة؟\",\n+        \"case_angle\": f\"قال لي أحد مشغّلي {name}: «{angle}». وإليك ما فعلناه.\",\n+    }[pillar]\n+\n+\n+def _body(vertical: dict[str, Any], pillar: str, language: str, hook: str, rng: random.Random) -> str:\n+    proof = vertical[\"proof_asset\"]\n+    if language == \"en\":\n+        return (\n+            f\"{hook}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"At Dealix we govern the workflow — not just automate it. We share a proof asset first: \"\n+            f\"{proof}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"No access to your data. Founder-reviewed. Conservative, provable claims only — no guarantees.\"\n+        )\n+    return (\n+        f\"{hook}\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"في ديالكس نحوكم سير العمل — لا نكتفي بأتمتته. نشارك أصل الإثبات أولًا: {proof}\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"دون أي وصول لبياناتكم. بمراجعة المؤسس. ادعاءات متحفظة وقابلة للإثبات فقط — بلا ضمانات.\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _hashtags(vertical_id: str, language: str, cfg: dict[str, Any], rng: random.Random) -> list[str]:\n+    bank = cfg[\"hashtags_bank\"]\n+    tags = list(rng.sample(bank[\"global\"], k=min(3, len(bank[\"global\"]))))\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        tags += rng.sample(bank[\"ar\"], k=min(2, len(bank[\"ar\"])))\n+    tags += bank.get(vertical_id, [])[:2]\n+    # de-dup, keep order\n+    seen: set[str] = set()\n+    out = []\n+    for t in tags:\n+        if t not in seen:\n+            seen.add(t)\n+            out.append(t)\n+    return out\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Scoring\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+def score_post(post: dict[str, Any], cfg: dict[str, Any], max_chars: int) -> tuple[int, int, list[str]]:\n+    body = (post.get(\"body\") or \"\")\n+    low = body.lower()\n+    quality = 100\n+    compliance = 100\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+\n+    # length fit\n+    if post.get(\"char_count\", 0) > max_chars:\n+        quality -= 30\n+        reasons.append(\"over_length\")\n+    if len(body) < 40:\n+        quality -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"too_short\")\n+\n+    # tied to vertical\n+    vt_en = post.get(\"vertical\", \"\")\n+    if not vt_en:\n+        quality -= 10\n+        reasons.append(\"no_vertical\")\n+\n+    # CTA present (most platforms)\n+    if not (post.get(\"cta\") or \"\").strip():\n+        quality -= 10\n+        reasons.append(\"no_cta\")\n+\n+    # banned / exaggeration terms\n+    if any(t.lower() in low for t in cfg[\"banned_terms\"]):\n+        quality -= 25\n+        compliance -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"exaggeration_or_banned\")\n+\n+    # guaranteed roi / data-access claims (compliance)\n+    if \"guaranteed\" in low or \"نضمن\" in body or \"مضمون\" in body:\n+        compliance -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"guaranteed_claim\")\n+    if \"we accessed your data\" in low or \"اطلعنا على بياناتكم\" in body:\n+        compliance -= 50\n+        reasons.append(\"data_access_claim\")\n+\n+    # invariants\n+    if post.get(\"post_allowed\") is True or post.get(\"external_post_blocked\") is False:\n+        compliance -= 100\n+        reasons.append(\"not_review_only\")\n+\n+    return max(min(quality, 100), 0), max(min(compliance, 100), 0), reasons\n+\n+\n+# generate_social(\n+    target: int | None = None,\n+    config_dir: Path | None = None,\n+    seed: int | None = None,\n+    run_date: str | None = None,\n+) -> SocialResult:\n+    cfg = int(rd.replace(\"-\", \"\")) + 7)\n+    created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()\n+\n+    targets = dict(cfg[\"daily_targets_by_platform\"])\n+    base_total = sum(targets.values())\n+ cfg[\"platforms\"]}\n+    pillars = [p[\"id\"] for p in cfg[\"content_pillars\"]]\n+    result = SocialResult(run_date=rd, targets=targets)\n+\n+    counter = 0\n+    for platform_id, count in targets.items():\n+        platform = platforms[platform_id]\n+        max_chars = platform[\"max_chars\"]\n+        produced = 0\n+        attempt = 0\n+        margin = int(count * 1.2) + 4\n+ len(pillars)]\n+            counter += 1\n+            attempt += 1\n+\n+            hook = _hook(vertical, pillar, language, rng)\n+            body = _body(vertical, pillar, language, hook, rng)\n+            hashtags = _hashtags(vertical[\"id\"], language, cfg, rng)\n+            cta = rng.choice(cfg[\"cta_bank\"][\"ar\" if language == \"ar\" else \"en\"])\n+\n+            # Ad copy + X stay short: trim body to the platform limit gracefully.\n+            if platform_id in (\"x_post\", \"ad_copy_google\"):\n+                body = hook  # short platforms use the hook as the post\n+            full_text = body\n+            if platform_id in (\"instagram_caption\", \"linkedin_post\"):\n+                full_text = f\"{body}\\n\\n{cta}\\n\\n{' '.join(hashtags)}\"\n+\n+            post = {\n+                \"post_id\": f\"DLX-SOC-{rd}-{platform_id[:3].upper()}-{counter:04d}\",\n+                \"created_at\": created_at,\n+                \"platform\": platform_id,\n+                \"vertical\": vertical[\"id\"],\n+                \"language\": language,\n+                \"pillar\": pillar,\n+                \"hook\": hook,\n+                \"body\": full_text,\n+                \"hashtags\": hashtags,\n+                \"cta\": cta,\n+                \"char_count\": len(full_text),\n+                \"post_allowed\": False,\n+                \"external_post_blocked\": True,\n+                \"requires_founder_approval\": True,\n+                \"no_ad_spend\": True,\n+                \"status\": \"founder_review\",\n+            }\n+            q, c, reasons = score_post(post, cfg, max_chars)\n+            post[\"quality_score\"] = q\n+            post[\"compliance_score\"] = c\n+            post[\"risk_level\"] = \"low\" if c >= 90 and q >= 80 else (\"medium\" if c >= 70 else \"high\")\n+            post[\"_reasons\"] = reasons\n+\n+            forbidden = any(f.lower() in full_text.lower() for f in _FORBIDDEN_POST_FRAGMENTS)\n+            if q >= 70 and c >= 70 and not forbidden:\n+                result.accepted.append(post)\n+                produced += 1\n+            else:\n+                post[\"reject_reason\"] = reasons or ([\"forbidden\"] if forbidden else [\"below_threshold\"])\n+                result.rejected.append(post)\n+            if attempt > margin * 6:\n+                break\n+\n+    if result.total_accepted < cfg[\"total_minimum\"]:\n+        result.warnings.append(\n+            f\"Only {result.total_accepted} posts cleared gates (< minimum {cfg['total_minimum']}).\"\n+        )\n+    return result\n+\n+\n+# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n+# Validation + outputs\n+# \"requires_founder_approval\", \"status\",\n+]\n+\n+\n+def validate_post_invariants(post: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:\n+    problems: list[str] = []\n+    for f in REQUIRED_POST_FIELDS:\n+        if f not in post:\n+            problems.append(f\"missing_field:{f}\")\n+    if post.get(\"post_allowed\") is not False:\n+        problems.append(\"post_allowed_not_false\")\n+    if post.get(\"external_post_blocked\") is not True:\n+        problems.append(\"external_post_blocked_not_true\")\n+    if post.get(\"requires_founder_approval\") is not True:\n+        problems.append(\"requires_founder_approval_not_true\")\n+    if post.get(\"status\") != \"founder_review\":\n+        problems.append(\"bad_status\")\n+    for banned in (\"auto_post\", number {\n+  let score = 0;\n+  if (body.company) score += 15;\n+  if (body.email || body.phone) score += 15;\n+  if (body.sector) score += 10;\n+  if (body.pain && body.pain.length >= 20) score += Captured as a lead (DRAFT-ONLY) for founder review. No auto-send.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    try:\n+        body = await req.json()\n+    except Exception as e:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"invalid_json\") from e\n+\n+    # Honeypot: if \"website\" field is filled, silently drop\n+    if body.get(\"website\"):\n+        log.info(\"custom_request_honeypot_triggered\")\n+        return {\"ok\": True, \"calendly_url\": CALENDLY_URL}\n+\n+    name = str(body.get(\"name\") or \"\").strip()\n+    company = str(body.get(\"company\") or \"\").strip()\n+    email = str(body.get(\"email\") or \"\").strip()\n+    phone = str(body.get(\"phone\") or \"\").strip()\n+    sector = str(body.get(\"sector\") or \"\").strip()\n+    what_to_build = str(body.get(\"what_to_build\") or body.get(\"message\") or \"\").strip()\n+    budget_range = str(body.get(\"budget_range\") or \"\").strip()\n+    timeline = str(body.get(\"timeline\") or \"\").strip()\n+    consent = bool(body.get(\"consent\"))\n+\n+    if not name or not company or \"@\" not in email:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"missing_required_fields\")\n+    if not what_to_build:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"what_to_build_required\")\n+    if not consent:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"consent_required\")\n+\n+    # Fire PostHog event (fire-and-forget — never blocks response)\n+    try:\n+        await capture_event(\n+            \"custom_request_submitted\",\n+            distinct_id=email,\n+            properties={\n+                \"name\": name,\n+                \"company\": company,\n+                \"email\": email,\n+                \"sector\": sector,\n+                \"budget_range\": budget_range,\n+                \"timeline\": timeline,\n+                \"what_to_build_len\": len(what_to_build),\n+                \"source\": \"web.custom_form\",\n+            },\n+        )\n+    except Exception:\n+        log.exception(\"posthog_capture_failed\")\n+\n+    # Persist to the gitignored lead-inbox so the daily engine + founder review\n+    # pick it up. It only writes local artifacts.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import hashlib\n+import random\n+import sys\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime, DATA_DIR,\n+    GOVERNING_RULE,\n+    MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+    load_config,\n+    read_jsonl,\n+    today_str,\n+    write_csv,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_jsonl,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+from relevant, reply 'unsubscribe' and you won't hear from me again.\"\n+OPT_OUT_AR = \"إن لم يكن هذا مناسبًا، الرجاء الرد بكلمة (إلغاء) ولن نعاود التواصل.\"\n+\n+\n+def _cta_for_stage(offer: dict[str, Any], lang: str) -> str:\n+    stage = offer.get(\"stage\")\n+    table = {\n+        \"audit\": (\"Request an AI Workflow Audit\", \"اطلب تدقيق سير العمل بالذكاء الاصطناعي\"),\n+        \"pilot\": (\"Start a Paid Pilot\", \"ابدأ تجربة مدفوعة\"),\n+        \"department_os\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+        \"retainer\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+        \"enterprise\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+    }\n+    en, ar = table.get(stage, (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"))\n+    return ar if lang == \"ar\" else en\n+\n+\n+def _price_label(offer: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n+    lo, hi = offer.get(\"price_min\"), offer.get(\"price_max\")\n+    if hi is None:\n+        return f\"{lo:,}+ SAR\"\n+    return f\"{lo:,}–{hi:,} SAR\"\n+\n+\n+def _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    city = lead[\"city\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    price = _price_label(offer)\n+    is_follow = channel == \"follow_up\"\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        vname = vert[\"name_ar\"]\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        oname = offer[\"name_ar\"]\n+        opener = (\n+            f\"أتابع رسالتي السابقة إلى {company} في {city}.\"\n+            if is_follow\n+            else f\"أتواصل مع {company} في {city}.\"\n+        )\n+        subject = f\"متابعة: {pang} في {company}\" if is_follow else f\"{pang} في {company}؟\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا فريق {company}،\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{opener} فرق {vname} غالبًا ما تفقد وقتًا في {pang}. \"\n+            f\"ديليكس هو نظام تشغيل للإيرادات والعمليات بالذكاء الاصطناعي يصيغ العمل ويرتّبه حسب الأولوية، \"\n+            f\"بينما يراجع فريقكم ويعتمد كل خطوة — ولا يُرسل شيء دون قرار بشري.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"هل يفيدكم {oname} ({price}) لرسم فرصتين أو ثلاث فرص سريعة في عملياتكم؟ \"\n+            f\"نحترم خصوصية بياناتكم ولا نعالجها قبل اتفاق واضح.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_AR}\\n— فريق ديليكس\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        vname = vert[\"name_en\"]\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        oname = offer[\"name_en\"]\n+        opener = (\n+            f\"Following up on my earlier note to {company} in {city}.\"\n+            if is_follow\n+            else f\"I'm reaching out to {company} in {city}.\"\n+        )\n+        subject = f\"Re: {pang} at {company}\" if is_follow else f\"{pang} at {company}?\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi {company} team,\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{opener} {vname} teams here often lose hours on {pang}. \"\n+            f\"Dealix is an AI revenue & operations OS that drafts and ranks the work while your team \"\n+            f\"reviews and approves every step — nothing goes out without a human.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"Would a short {oname} ({price}) help us map two or three quick wins for your operations? \"\n+            f\"We keep your data private and never process it before a clear agreement.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_EN}\\n— The Dealix team\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"رسالة لينكدإن — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا، لاحظت عمل {company} في {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"كثير من فرق {vert['name_ar']} تتعامل مع {pang}. \"\n+            f\"في ديليكس نصيغ ونرتّب العمل بالذكاء الاصطناعي، ويبقى الاعتماد والإرسال بيد فريقكم دائمًا. \"\n+            f\"{cta}؟ (هذه مسودة يدوية للمراجعة — لا أتمتة على لينكدإن.)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"LinkedIn note — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi — saw the work {company} is doing in {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"Many {vert['name_en']} teams wrestle with {pang}. \"\n+            f\"Dealix drafts and ranks the work with AI while your team keeps approval and sending. \"\n+            f\"Open to a quick chat? {cta}. (Manual draft for review — no LinkedIn automation.)\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"نقاط نموذج التواصل — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"ملاحظات يدوية للمؤسس قبل ملء نموذج التواصل الخاص بـ {company}:\\n\"\n+            f\"- القطاع: {vert['name_ar']} في {lead['city']}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- الزاوية: {pang}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- العرض المقترح: {offer['name_ar']} ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- الدعوة: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"ملاحظة: لا إرسال تلقائي للنماذج — يقوم المؤسس بالتعبئة يدويًا.\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"Contact-form talking points — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Manual talking points for the founder before filling {company}'s contact form:\\n\"\n+            f\"- Vertical: {vert['name_en']} in {lead['city']}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- Angle: {pang}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- Suggested offer: {offer['name_en']} ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- CTA: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"Note: no form auto-submit — the founder fills this manually.\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _make_draft(\n+    seq, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    if channel in (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\"):\n+        subject, body = _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+        opt_out = OPT_OUT_AR if lang == \"ar\" else OPT_OUT_EN\n+    elif channel == \"linkedin_manual\":\n+        subject, body = _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+    else:\n+        subject, body = _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+\n+    # Privacy-sensitive verticals (e.g. legal) must always carry privacy-first language.\n+    if vert.get(\"privacy_sensitive\"):\n+        if lang == \"ar\":\n+            body += \"\\n\\nنلتزم بحماية الخصوصية ولا نعالج أي بيانات شخصية قبل موافقتك واتفاق مكتوب.\"\n+        else:\n+            body += \"\\n\\nWe are privacy-first: we don't process any personal data before your consent and a written agreement.\"\n+\n+    raw_id = f\"{batch_id}:{channel}:{seq}:{lead['lead_id']}:{offer['id']}:{lang}\"\n+    draft_id = \"drf_\" + hashlib.sha1(raw_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]  # noqa: S324 - non-crypto id\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+\n+    opt_in = lead.get(\"opt_in_status\", \"unknown\")\n+    research_required = opt_in == \"unknown\"\n+\n+    draft: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"created_at\": created_at,\n+        \"company_name\": lead[\"company_name\"],\n+        \"source_lead_id\": lead[\"lead_id\"],\n+        \"vertical\": vert[\"id\"],\n+        \"country\": lead[\"country\"],\n+        \"city\": lead[\"city\"],\n+        \"channel\": channel,\n+        \"language\": lang,\n+        \"buyer_persona\": lead.get(\"buyer_persona\", \"\"),\n+        \"buyer_title\": lead.get(\"buyer_title\", \"\"),\n+        \"offer_stage\": offer[\"stage\"],\n+        \"offer_name\": offer[\"name_en\"],\n+        \"pain_angle\": pain[\"en\"],\n+        \"trigger_event\": random.choice(\n+            vert.get(\"triggers\", [\"general outreach\"])\n+        ),  # noqa: S311 - non-crypto sample selection\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"cta\": cta,\n+        \"opt_out\": opt_out,\n+        \"opt_in_status\": opt_in,\n+        \"quality_score\": 0,\n+        \"compliance_score\": 0,\n+        \"fit_score\": 0,\n+        \"priority_score\": 0.0,\n+        \"risk_level\": \"low\",\n+        \"research_required\": research_required,\n+        \"founder_notes\": \"\",\n+        \"rejection_reason\": \"\",\n+        \"status\": \"ready_for_founder_review\",\n+        **MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+    }\n+    return draft\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, day: str, seed_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    rng = random.Random(f\"dealix-{day}\")  # noqa: S311 - deterministic, non-crypto draft variety\n+    random.seed(f\"dealix-trigger-{day}\")\n+\n+    verticals = load_config(\"commercial_verticals.json\")[\"verticals\"]\n+    vert_by_id = {v[\"id\"]: v for v in verticals}\n+    offers = load_config(\"commercial_offers.json\")[\"offers\"]\n+    offer_by_id = {o[\"id\"]: o for o in offers}\n+    distribution = load_config(\"commercial_draft_distribution.json\")[\"distribution\"]\n+    quality_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_quality_gates.json\")\n+    compliance_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_compliance_gates.json\")\n+    risk_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_risk_terms.json\")\n+    weights = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\").get(\"priority_weights\", {})\n+\n+    leads = read_jsonl(seed_path)\n+    if not leads:\n+        raise SystemExit(f\"No seed leads found at {seed_path}\")\n+\n+    # Scale distribution up proportionally if a higher target is requested.\n+    base_total = sum(distribution.values()) or 1\n+    scale = max(1, -(-target // base_total))  # ceil division\n+    plan = {ch: count * scale for ch, count in distribution.items()}\n+\n+    created_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+    batch_id = f\"batch_{day}\"\n+    langs = [\"en\", \"ar\"]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    for channel, count in plan.items():\n+        for i in range(count):\n+            lead = leads[(i * 7 + len(drafts)) % len(leads)]\n+            vert = vert_by_id.get(lead[\"vertical\"], verticals[0])\n+            offer = offer_by_id.get(vert.get(\"recommended_offer\", \"ai_workflow_audit\"), offers[0])\n+            # Mix in a higher-tier offer occasionally for variety.\n+            if i % 5 == 4:\n+                offer = rng.choice(offers[:3])\n+            pain = rng.choice(vert[\"pain_angles\"])\n+            lang = langs[(i + len(drafts)) % 2]\n+            draft = _make_draft(i, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+            drafts.append(draft)\n+\n+    # Score + gate every draft.\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        q = evaluate_quality(d, quality_cfg)\n+        c = evaluate_compliance(d, compliance_cfg)\n+        d[\"quality_score\"] = q[\"score\"]\n+        d[\"compliance_score\"] = c[\"score\"]\n+        score_draft(d, risk_cfg, weights)\n+        reasons = q[\"reasons\"] + c[\"reasons\"]\n+        if not (q[\"passed\"] and c[\"passed\"]):\n+            d[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n+            d[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"; \".join(reasons) or \"failed_gate\"\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"drafts\": drafts,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"day\": day,\n+        \"plan\": plan,\n+        \"leads_used\": len(leads),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _verify_safety(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        assert d[\"send_allowed\"] is False, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"external_send_blocked\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"requires_founder_approval\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"no_auto_send\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+\n+\n+def write_outputs(result: dict[str, Any], out_dir: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    drafts = result[\"drafts\"]\n+    _verify_safety(drafts)\n+    review_rules = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\")\n+\n+    approved = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_founder_review\"]\n+    rejected = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"rejected\"]\n+    needs_research = [d for d in drafts if d.get(\"research_required\")]\n+    ranked = sorted(approved, key=lambda d: d[\"priority_score\"], reverse=True)\n+\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\", drafts)\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"rejected_drafts.jsonl\", rejected)\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"needs_research.jsonl\", needs_research)\n+\n+    # Founder review CSV + MD\n+    cols = review_rules[\"review_columns\"]\n+    rows = [[d.get(c, \"\") for c in cols] for d in ranked]\n+    write_csv(out_dir / \"founder_review.csv\", cols, rows)\n+\n+    md = [\n+        f\"# Founder Review Queue — {result['day']}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {GOVERNING_RULE}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"- Total drafts: **{len(drafts)}**\",\n+        f\"- Ready for review: **{len(approved)}**\",\n+        f\"- Rejected by gates: **{len(rejected)}**\",\n+        f\"- Needs research: **{len(needs_research)}**\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"All drafts are review-only. `send_allowed=false`, `no_auto_send=true`. \"\n+        \"The founder approves and sends manually; the system never sends.\",",

f\"{opener} فرق {vname} غالبًا ما تفقد وقتًا في {pang}. \"\n+            f\"ديليكس هو نظام تشغيل للإيرادات والعمليات بالذكاء الاصطناعي يصيغ العمل ويرتّبه حسب الأولوية، \"\n+            f\"بينما يراجع           f\"reviews and approves every step — nothing goes out without a human.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"Would a short {oname} ({price}) help us map two or three quick wins for your operations? \"\n+            f\"We keep your data private and never process it before a clear agreement.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_EN}\\n— The Dealix team\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"رسالة لينكدإن — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا، لاحظت عمل {company} في {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"كثير من للمراجعة — لا أتمتة على لينكدإن.)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"LinkedIn note — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi — saw the work (Manual draft for review — no LinkedIn automation.)\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"Contact-form talking points — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Manual talking points for the founder before filling ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- CTA: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"Note: no form auto-submit — the founder fills this manually.\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _make_draft(\n+    seq, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    if channel in (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\"):\n+        subject, body = _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+        opt_out = OPT_OUT_AR if lang == \"ar\" else OPT_OUT_EN\n+    elif channel == \"linkedin_manual\":\n+        subject, body = _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+    else:\n+        subject, body = _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+\n+    # Privacy-sensitive verticals (e.g. legal) must always carry privacy-first language.\n+    if vert.get(\"privacy_sensitive\"):\n+        if lang == \"ar\":\n+            body += \"\\n\\nنلتزم بحماية الخصوصية ولا نعالج أي بيانات شخصية قبل موافقتك واتفاق مكتوب.\"\n+        else:\n+            body += \"\\n\\nWe are privacy-first: we don't process any personal data before your consent and a written agreement.\"\n+\n+    raw_id = f\"{batch_id}:{channel}:{seq}:{lead['lead_id']}:{offer['id']}:{lang}\"\n+    draft_id = \"drf_\" + hashlib.sha1(raw_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]  # noqa: S324 - non-crypto id\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+\n+    opt_in = lead.get(\"opt_in_status\", \"unknown\")\n+    research_required = opt_in == \"unknown\"\n+\n+    draft: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"created_at\": created_at,\n+        \"company_name\": lead[\"company_name\"],\n+        \"source_lead_id\":       \"buyer_persona\": lead.get(\"buyer_persona\", \"\"),\n+        \"buyer_title\": lead.get(\"buyer_title\", \"\"),\n+        \"offer_stage\": offer[\"stage\"],\n+        \"offer_name\": offer[\"name_en\"],\n+        \"pain_angle\": pain[\"en\"],\n+        \"trigger_event\": random.choice(\n+            vert.get(\"triggers\", [\"general outreach\"])\n+        ),  # noqa: S311 - non-crypto sample selection\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"cta\": cta,\n+        \"opt_out\": opt_out,\n+        \"opt_in_status\": opt_in,\n+ draft\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, day: str, seed_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    rng = random.Random(f\"dealix-{day}\")  # noqa: S311 - deterministic, non-crypto draft variety\n+    random.seed(f\"dealix-trigger-{day}\")\n+\n+    verticals = load_config(\"commercial_verticals.json\")[\"verticals\"]\n+    vert_by_id = {v[\"id\"]: v for v in verticals}\n+    offers = load_config(\"commercial_offers.json\")[\"offers\"]\n+    offer_by_id = {o[\"id\"]: o for o in offers}\n+    distribution = load_config(\"commercial_draft_distribution.json\")[\"distribution\"]\n+    quality_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_quality_gates.json\")\n+    compliance_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_compliance_gates.json\")\n+    risk_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_risk_terms.json\")\n+    weights = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\").get(\"priority_weights\", {})\n+\n+    leads = read_jsonl(seed_path)\n+    if not leads:\n+        raise SystemExit(f\"No seed leads found at {seed_path}\")\n+\n+    # Scale distribution up proportionally if a higher target is requested.\n+    base_total = sum(distribution.values()) or 1\n+    scale = max(1, -(-target // base_total))  # ceil division\n+    plan = {ch: count * scale for ch, count in distribution.items()}\n+\n+    created_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+    batch_id = f\"batch_{day}\"\n+    langs = [\"en\", \"ar\"]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    for channel, count in plan.items():\n+        for i in range(count):\n+            lead = leads[(i * 7 + len(drafts)) % len(leads)]\n+            vert = vert_by_id.get(lead[\"vertical\"], verticals[0])\n+            offer = offer_by_id.get(vert.get(\"recommended_offer\", \"ai_workflow_audit\"), offers[0])\n+            # Mix in a higher-tier offer occasionally for variety.\n+            if i % 5 == 4:\n+                offer = rng.choice(offers[:3])\n+            pain = rng.choice(vert[\"pain_angles\"])\n+            lang = langs[(i + len(drafts)) % 2]\n+            draft = _make_draft(i, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+            drafts.append(draft)\n+\n+    # Score + gate every draft.\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        q = evaluate_quality(d, quality_cfg)\n+        c = evaluate_compliance(d, compliance_cfg)\n+        d[\"quality_score\"] = q[\"score\"]\n+ \"day\": day,\n+        \"plan\": plan,\n+        \"leads_used\": len(leads),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _verify_safety(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        assert d[\"send_allowed\"] is False, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"external_send_blocked\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"requires_founder_approval\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+ It connects the\nfull path from the first look at a company to renewal:\n\n```\nMarket research → company intelligence → compliance gate → scoring →\nweakness mapping → offer routing → drafts (founder-approval) → diagnostic →\npayment → delivery handoff → proof pack → upsell → learning loop ⟲\n```\n\nEvery company exits with one of three verdicts: **Target now / Nurture later /\nReject (with reason)**. Every company that pays exits with **Delivery Pack +\nProof Pack + Upsell Decision**.\n\n---\n\n### What's in this PR\n\n**Scripts** (`scripts/targeting_*.py`) — offline, deterministic, stdlib + PyYAML.\nNo network, no LLM, no scraping, so every output is reviewable and reproducible:\n\n| Stage | Script |\n|-------|--------|\n| Query factory (manual run) | `targeting_query_factory.py` |\n| Discovery (seed consolidation) | `targeting_discovery.py` |\n| Normalize / dedupe | `targeting_normalizer.py` |\n| Compliance gate | `targeting_compliance_gate.py` |\n| Scoring (0–100, auditable) | `targeting_scorecard.py` |\n| Weakness mapping | `targeting_weakness_mapper.py` |\n| Offer routing | `targeting_offer_router.py` |\n| Draft Lab (no auto-send) | `targeting_draft_lab.py` |\n| Daily founder brief (orchestrator) | `targeting_daily_brief.py` |\n| Delivery handoff (paid → customer folder) | `targeting_delivery_handoff.py` |\n| Learning loop (weekly retro) | `targeting_learning_loop.py` |\n| Shared helpers | `targeting_common.py` |\n\n**Config + sample data** — `data/targeting/`: `scoring_weights.yml`, `sectors.yml`,\n`cities.yml`, `signals.yml`, `blocked_sources.yml`, `company_master.jsonl`,\n`company_seed_template.csv`, `outcomes.jsonl`. `validate_draft` blocks it.\n- ❌ No scraping behind login; robots.txt + source terms respected (compliance gate).\n- ❌ No personal phone numbers / leaked data → hard reject with a reason.\n- ✅ Every target carries evidence (`minimum_evidence_count`).\n- ✅ Every draft requires founder approval.\n- ✅ Every paid target creates a delivery handoff (11-file customer folder).\n- ✅ Every delivery produces a proof pack (L1→L5).\n- ✅ Sensitive sectors held for governance review, never auto-targeted.\n\n---\n\n### Run it\n\n```bash\n# Daily brief (compliance → score → weakness → offer → drafts)\npython scripts/targeting_daily_brief.py --in data/targeting/company_master.jsonl --out data/targeting/out\n# After a company pays:\npython scripts/targeting_delivery_handoff.py --company \"Company Name\"\n# Weekly:\npython scripts/targeting_learning_loop.py --out data/targeting/out\n```\n\n### Verify\n\n```bash\npython -m pytest tests/test_targeting_scorecard.py \\\n  tests/test_targeting_compliance_gate.py \\\n  tests/test_targeting_delivery_handoff.py \\\n  tests/test_targeting_pipeline.py -q\n```\n\n> Note: the canonical orchestrator is `targeting_daily_brief.py` (the spec's\n> `research_targeting_os.py` is realized as this end-to-end daily brief).\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01DRAJYq3dHqAhkCgzAk5uqA\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01DRAJYq3dHqAhkCgzAk5uqA)_",

.\reports\github-context\pr-667\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,696 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Dealix Day-0 Company Activation — one command that stands the company up.\n+\n+محرّك التشغيل اليومي: أمر واحد يولّد حزمة المُشغّل الكاملة لليوم.\n+\n+What it produces (under ``data/day0/<date>/``):\n+\n+  1. ``prospects.csv`` / ``prospects.md`` — your prospect list, ICP-scored and\n+     ranked, each with a deterministic qualification verdict + recommended\n+     offer from the 5-rung ladder.\n+  2. ``call_list.md`` — the prioritized \"who to contact today\" list with\n+     bilingual talking points + objection notes. **You** make the contact;\n+     the system never dials, emails, or messages anyone.\n+  3. ``draft_pack.md`` — ready-to-edit bilingual outreach drafts, each\n+     pre-screened through the qualification engine. Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Every artifact is a file you read, edit, and act on.\n+  - No scraping. Prospects come from the CSV you control (a clearly-labelled\n+    sample seed ships so the command runs out-of-the-box on a fresh clone).\n+  - No guaranteed outcomes / no invented metrics. Estimates are labelled.\n+  - Every recommended action carries a ``governance_decision`` and the\n+    bilingual disclaimer.\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py                      # uses the sample seed\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --prospects data/prospects.csv\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --warm-list data/warm_list.csv\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --top 8 --date 2026-06-07\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --json               # machine-readable summary\n+\n+Exit codes:\n+    0  operator pack generated\n+    1  no prospect rows found (seed missing or empty)\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import csv\n+import json\n+import sys\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n+sys.path.insert(0, str(REPO_ROOT))\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.sales_os.icp_score import ICPDimensions, icp_score  # noqa: E402\n+from auto_client_acquisition.sales_os.qualification import qualify  # noqa: E402\n+\n+DISCLAIMER = (\n+    \"Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة. \"\n+    \"Estimated outcomes are not guaranteed outcomes / النتائج التقديرية ليست نتائج مضمونة.\"\n+)\n+\n+# The 5-rung commercial ladder (priced, wired). Keep in sync with docs/pricing.\n+OFFER_LADDER = {\n+    \"revenue_intelligence_sprint\": (\n+        \"7-Day Revenue Intelligence Sprint\",\n+        \"Sprint إيرادات 7 أيام\",\n+        \"499 SAR\",\n+    ),\n+    \"data_to_revenue_diagnostic\": (\n+        \"Data-to-Revenue Pack\",\n+        \"حزمة البيانات إلى الإيراد\",\n+        \"1,500 SAR\",\n+    ),\n+    \"data_to_revenue_pack\": (\"Data-to-Revenue Pack\", \"حزمة البيانات إلى الإيراد\", \"1,500 SAR\"),\n+    \"capability_diagnostic\": (\"Free AI Ops Diagnostic\", \"تشخيص العمليات المجاني\", \"0 SAR\"),\n+    \"managed_revenue_ops\": (\"Managed Revenue Ops\", \"تشغيل الإيرادات المُدار\", \"2,999–4,999 SAR/mo\"),\n+    \"refer_out_governance_not_accepted\": (\n+        \"Refer out — governance not accepted\",\n+        \"إحالة — لم تُقبل الحوكمة\",\n+        \"—\",\n+    ),\n+    \"refer_out_not_enough_fit\": (\"Refer out — insufficient fit\", \"إحالة — ملاءمة غير كافية\", \"—\"),\n+    \"not_a_fit_decline_politely\": (\n+        \"Decline politely — doctrine risk\",\n+        \"اعتذار مهذّب — مخالفة دكترين\",\n+        \"—\",\n+    ),\n+}\n+\n+OWNER_TITLES = {\"CEO\", \"COO\", \"GM\", \"FOUNDER\", \"MD\", \"VP\", \"MANAGING PARTNER\", \"OWNER\", \"DIRECTOR\"}\n+\n+# Sector → b2b-service fit (0–100). Deterministic, conservative.\n+SECTOR_FIT = {\n+    \"b2b_services\": 92,\n+    \"consulting\": 90,\n+    \"agency\": 88,\n+    \"saas\": 88,\n+    \"it_services\": 86,\n+    \"financial_services\": 80,\n+    \"logistics\": 76,\n+    \"distribution\": 74,\n+    \"manufacturing\": 70,\n+    \"real_estate\": 68,\n+    \"healthcare\": 66,\n+    \"retail\": 64,\n+    \"education\": 62,\n+    \"events\": 58,\n+    \"agritech\": 60,\n+}\n+\n+INBOUND_SOURCES = {\"inbound_form\", \"inbound_whatsapp\", \"inbound_email\", \"demo_request\"}\n+WARM_SOURCES = {\"warm_intro\", \"partner_referral\", \"referral\"}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class Prospect:\n+    name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    city: str = \"\"\n+    country: str = \"SA\"\n+    domain: str = \"\"\n+    contact_name: str = \"\"\n+    contact_title: str = \"\"\n+    source: str = \"manual_research\"\n+    locale: str = \"ar-SA\"\n+    annual_turnover_sar: int = 0\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def from_row(cls, row: dict[str, str]) -> Prospect:\n+        def s(key: str, default: str = \"\") -> str:\n+            return (row.get(key) or default).strip()\n+\n+        turnover_raw = s(\"annual_turnover_sar\", \"0\").replace(\",\", \"\")\n+        try:\n+            turnover = int(float(turnover_raw)) if turnover_raw else 0\n+        except ValueError:\n+            turnover = 0\n+        return cls(\n+            name=s(\"name\"),\n+            sector=s(\"sector\").lower(),\n+            city=s(\"city\"),\n+            country=s(\"country\", \"SA\"),\n+ locale=s(\"locale\", \"ar-SA\"),\n+            annual_turnover_sar=turnover,\n+            notes=s(\"notes\"),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class ScoredProspect:\n+    prospect: Prospect\n+    icp: int\n+    dimensions: dict[str, int]\n+    decision: str\n+    qual_score: int\n+    recommended_offer: str\n+    reasons: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+    doctrine_violations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    @property\n+    def is_owner(self) -> bool:\n+        return self.prospect.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+\n+# ── Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 1_000_000:\n+        return 55\n+    if turnover < 3_000_000:\n+        return 75\n+    if turnover < 7_000_000:\n+        return 85\n+    return 90\n+\n+\n+def _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+    base = 40\n+    if p.domain:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.annual_turnover_sar > 0:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.sector in {\"saas\", \"it_services\", \"financial_services\"}:\n+        base += 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def derive_dimensions(p: Prospect) -> ICPDimensions:\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+    return ICPDimensions(\n+        b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or \"struggl\" in p.notes.lower()\n+        or \"wants\" in p.notes.lower(),\n+        owner_present=is_owner,\n+        data_available=dims.data_maturity >= 60,\n+        accepts_governance=True,  # pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+ reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+DECISION_BADGE = {\n+    \"accept\": \"✅ accept — reach out today\",\n+    \"diagnostic_only\": \"🔵 diagnostic-only — lead with the free diagnostic\",\n+    \"reframe\": \"🟡 reframe — book a short scope call\",\n+    \"reject\": \"🔴 reject — doctrine risk, decline politely\",\n+    \"refer_out\": \"⚪ refer-out — not enough fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, \"—\")\n+    )\n+    ar = [\n+        f\"الافتتاح: «لاحظت أن {p.name} في قطاع {p.sector} — نساعد شركات مثلكم على ترتيب الفرص وتنظيف البيانات تحت حوكمة AI واضحة.»\",\n+        f\"الربط بالألم: استند إلى ملاحظتك ({p.notes or 'تحديات متابعة العملاء'}).\",\n+        f\"العرض المقترح: {offer_ar} ({price}) — ابدأ صغير، أثبت القيمة، بدون وعود.\",\n+        \"الحوكمة كميزة: لا scraping، لا رسائل باردة، موافقتك قبل أي إجراء خارجي + Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"الخطوة التالية: احجز 20 دقيقة، أو ابدأ بالتشخيص المجاني خلال 24 ساعة.\",\n+    ]\n+    en = [\n+        f\"Open: “I noticed {p.name} in {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up gaps'}).\",\n+        f\"Recommend: {offer_en} ({price}) — start small, prove value, no promises.\",\n+        \"Governance as the edge: no scraping, no cold messaging, your approval before any external action + a Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"Next step: book 20 minutes, or start the free 24h diagnostic.\",\n+    ]\n+    if sp.decision in (\"reject\", \"refer_out\"):\n+        ar = [\"هذا المُرشّح غير ملائم الآن — اعتذر بلطف أو أحِله لشريك. لا تتابع.\"]\n+        en = [\"Not a fit right now — decline politely or refer to a partner. Do not pursue.\"]\n+    return ar, en\n+\n+\n+# ── Renderers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _gov_block(decision_summary: str) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        \"> **governance_decision:** `internal_artifact` · no external action taken · \"\n+        f\"{decision_summary}\\n>\\n> _{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], generated: str) -> str:\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Prospect shortlist — قائمة العملاء المحتملين (مُقيّمة ومرتّبة)\\n\",\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\",\n+        \"\\n> **Source:** the prospect CSV you control. Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Every artifact is a file you read, edit, and act on.\n+  - No scraping. Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. .\reports\github-context\pr-621\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Dealix Research & Targeting OS\n\nA repeatable, **governed** daily loop that turns seeds + allowlisted research into a scored, evidence-backed **target pool** — not an outbound blaster. **Quality over volume. No external send without founder approval.**\n\n> The \"400\" is a research/analysis pool, **not** 400 messages.\n\n### What it does\n1. Collect (seeds ± allowlisted discovery) → 2. Normalize (AR/EN names + domains) → 3. De-dupe (domain, then name; merge evidence) → 4. Attach evidence → 5. Score (100-pt model) → 6. Infer weakness → Dealix OS → 7. Recommend offer rung → 8. Emit raw pool / shortlist → 9. Build **review-only** drafts.\n\n### Scoring (100 pts)\nICP Fit 35 · Pain Signal 25 · Intent/Timing 20 · Access 10 · Evidence Confidence 10 · Risk Penalty −20 → grades A+/A/B/C/D.\n\n**Golden rule (enforced):** never target without **2 pain evidences OR a warm path** — otherwise the grade is capped at **B** and routed to a free Diagnostic.\n\n### Weakness → Dealix OS\nProof weakness→Proof OS · Follow-up leakage→Revenue OS · Delivery visibility→Delivery OS · Support recurrence→Support OS · Executive decision fog→Command OS · Data fragmentation→Data OS.\n\n### Governance / non-negotiables\n- Reuses the canonical doctrine guard `safe_send_gateway` + `governance_os.claim_safety`.\n- Allowed sources pinned in `data/targeting/source_allowlist.json`; **blocked sources hard-rejected and logged**.\n- No scraping behind login · no robots.txt/CAPTCHA bypass · no LinkedIn automation · no cold/bulk WhatsApp · no mass email · **no auto-send** · no claim without evidence.\n\n### Files\n| Path | Purpose |\n| --- | --- |\n| `scripts/research_targeting_os.py` | The engine (dependency-light, importable, CLI). |\n| `data/targeting/{company_seed_template.csv,queries.txt,source_allowlist.json}` | Inputs. |\n| `docs/go-to-market/RESEARCH_TARGETING_OS.md` | System spec (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/go-to-market/DAILY_400_TARGETING_PLAYBOOK.md` | Daily ritual (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/governance/PROSPECT_RESEARCH_COMPLIANCE_POLICY.md` | Binding policy (AR+EN). |\n| `.github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml` | 08:00 Riyadh; Not a problem, but gives a better\nexception instead of RangeError on stack overflow.</li>\n<li>Added <code>maxMergeSeqLength</code> (20) loader option. Not a problem after <code>merge</code> fix,\nbut an additional restriction for safety.</li>\n<li>Added sourcemaps to <code>dist/</code> builds.</li>\n</ul>\n<h3>Changed</h3>\n<ul>\n<li>Stop resolving numbers with underscores as numeric scalars, <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/627\">#627</a>.</li>\n<li>Switched dev toolchains to Vite / neostandard.</li>\n<li>Updated demo.</li>\n<li>Reorganized tests.</li>\n<li><code>dist/</code> files are no longer kept in the repository.</li>\n</ul>\n<h3>Fixed</h3>\n<ul>\n<li>Fix parsing of properties on the first implicit block mapping key, <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/62\">#62</a>.</li>\n<li>Fix trailing whitespace handling when folding flow scalar lines, <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/307\">#307</a>.</li>\n<li>Reject top-level block scalars without content indentation, <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/280\">#280</a>.</li>\n<li>Ensure numbers survive round-trip, <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/737\">#737</a>.</li>\n<li>Fix test coverage for issue <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/221\">#221</a>.</li>\n<li>Fix flow scalar trailing whitespace folding, <a href=\"https://redirect.github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/issues/307\">#307</a>.</li>\n<li>Fix digits in YAML named tag handles.</li>\n</ul>\n<h3>Security</h3>\n<ul>\n<li>Fix potential DoS via quadratic complexity in merge - deduplicate repeated\nelements (makes sense for malformed files &gt; 10K).</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>[3.14.2] - 2025-11-15</h2>\n<h3>Security</h3>\n<ul>\n<li>Backported v4.1.1 fix to v3</li>\n</ul>\n</blockquote>\n</details>\n<details>\n<summary>Commits</summary>\n<ul>\n<li>See full diff in <a href=\"https://github.com/nodeca/js-yaml/commits\">compare view</a></li>\n</ul>\n</details>\n<br />\n\n\n[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=js-yaml&package-manager=npm_and_yarn&previous-version=4.1.1&new-version=4.2.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores)\n\nDependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. .\reports\github-context\pr-701\detail.json:9:  "body": "## ما الذي يفعله هذا الـ PR / What this does\n\nيرفع Dealix إلى **شركة أنظمة تحوّل (Transformation Systems)** — لكن **بالطريقة المحكومة**: دمج في الكتالوج الموحّد والمعمارية ذات الطبقات الخمس، بدل سايلو منفصل يكسر CI والدكترين.\n\nElevates Dealix into a Transformation Systems company **the governed way** — integrated into the canonical catalog and 5-plane architecture, not a parallel silo.\n\n### لماذا ليس سكربت الـ silo / Why not the original script\nThe originally-proposed `transformation_os/` tree (duplicate YAML catalog + standalone proposal generator + flat price list) would have **broken CI** (the `exactly-7` catalog test + `count==7` JSON test), **duplicated the single source of truth** (`registry.py`, Article 11), and **bypassed the 10 doctrine non-negotiables**. This PR delivers the same vision through the existing governed surfaces instead.\n\n## التغييرات / Changes\n\n**Catalog (single source of truth):**\n- `ServiceOffering` gains optional setup/monthly range fields + a `\"transformation\"` journey stage (the 7 core offerings are unchanged).\n- 10 Enterprise Transformation OS offerings added → registry **7 → 17**: AI Command Center, WhatsApp Revenue, Brand Intelligence, AI Agent Workforce, Client Experience, Operations Automation, Executive Reporting, Trust & Governance, Growth Engine, Custom Enterprise System. Prices are **estimate ranges** (`is_estimate=True`).\n- All 10 wired into `commercial_map` (`_WIRING`/`_OFFER_NOTES`), founder-issued checkout.\n- Regenerated `landing/assets/data/services-catalog.json` (count 17).\n\n**Doctrine-safe by construction:**\n- No `live_send`/`live_charge`; every offering's `hard_gates` include `no_cold_whatsapp`, `no_scraping`, `no_fake_proof`.\n- **Growth Engine OS** is draft-only/approval-gated (no cold outreach, no LinkedIn automation, no blast, no scraping) — verified by a dedicated test.\n- No `\"guaranteed\"/\"نضمن\"` anywhere (token-scanned).\n\n**Governed, stateless generators** (read prices from the catalog, approval-gated, estimate-stamped, bilingual AR+EN):\n- `dealix/commercial/transformation_proposal.py`\n- `dealix/commercial/roi_calculator.py`\n- `api/routers/commercial.py`: `POST /api/v1/commercial/transformation-proposal/generate(/markdown)`, `POST /api/v1/commercial/roi/estimate`.\n\n**Tests:** count `7→17` in `test_service_catalog` + `test_wave15_customer_journey_e2e`; ladder test scoped to the core funnel; new catalog/proposal/router/ROI tests.\n\n**Docs:** Transformation OS master positioning (AR+EN), 4-front roadmap, and `enterprise_package/` MSA · DPA · ROI worksheet · multi-stakeholder playbook. `no_overclaim` register updated.\n\n## ملاحظات / Notes\n- **Service Readiness Matrix intentionally untouched** — it's a decoupled 32-row taxonomy count-locked by its own tests; expanding it is a documented roadmap item.\n- **Roadmap (future PRs):** security hardening (existing `scorecard.yml` remediation), enterprise trust pack, proposal/ROI persistence, brand/identity OS.\n\n## التحقق / Verification\n- 138 relevant tests pass (catalog, transformation, proposal, ROI, router, doctrine guards, commercial chain, wave15, commercial-map).\n- `compileall` across all CI packages: OK. Catalog JSON regenerated & in sync. OpenAPI exports fine (only adds paths). Readiness matrix verifier green & JSON untouched. `ruff` clean (except the pre-existing `exec` S102 pattern shared with `test_service_catalog.py`).\n- 2 unrelated pricing failures (`test_checkout_pages` static `pricing.html` CTA; `test_pricing_plans_endpoint` Redis idempotency) were confirmed to **fail identically on clean `main`** — pre-existing, not introduced here.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01276EaqeDNctaRSDnf4Hsjt\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01276EaqeDNctaRSDnf4Hsjt)_",
