.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_005.md:67:1. **المادة الخامسة من نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL):** تشترط أساساً نظامياً لكل معالجة. جواز المصدر يُسجِّل هذا الأساس.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_005.md:115:1. **PDPL Article 5 (lawful basis):** every processing activity requires a documented legal basis. The Source Passport records that basis at the moment of intake.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_005.md:116:2. **PDPL Article 18 (audit trail):** every processing event must leave a referenceable record. The Passport is the record.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_005.md:125:3. **Shared credentials:** no single owner, so no trusted signature. No Passport possible.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_005.md:127:These are not commercial preferences — they are direct readings of PDPL and governance norms.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_005.md:137:`#SaudiAI` `#PDPL` `#DataGovernance` `#B2B`
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_004.md:117:`#SaudiAI` `#PDPL` `#RevenueOps` `#B2B` `#ProofOverPromise`
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_002.md:74:At Dealix, data does not enter the system without a Source Passport. No exception. No "we will take it now and document it later." If a dataset has no passport, the gate refuses it. This is not bureaucracy; it is a direct application of PDPL Article 5, which requires a lawful basis for every processing activity.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_002.md:107:If you cannot answer, today, the question "who owns this dataset and what is it allowed to do," your team is one regulator letter away from a freeze. The cheapest version of governance is to attach a passport at intake. The most expensive version is to reconstruct provenance after a breach, in 72 hours, under PDPL Article 21 reporting obligations.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_002.md:115:`#SaudiAI` `#PDPL`
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_001.md:55:- **Refusal #1 — cold WhatsApp.** Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), Article 5, requires a lawful basis for processing personal data. Cold WhatsApp messages without recorded opt-in do not clear that bar. We do not send them, and we do not build tools that send them on a customer's behalf.
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_001.md:78:#SaudiAI #PDPL #RevenueOps #B2B
.\docs\content\LINKEDIN_POST_001.md:84:The Saudi B2B market is moving fast on AI adoption. The fastest move is also the easiest to regret: bolting an automation layer onto a process you have not yet governed. The shortcut that buys you a quarter of vanity metrics costs you the year of trust with your customers, your regulators, and your own team. We are betting that the durable companies will be the ones that refused the shortcut publicly, and built the audit trail that makes refusal credible.

.\docs\gtm\outreach\SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md:47:`BLOCKING_HEALTH = {unhealthy, bounce_spike, spam_warning}`. Any of these **blocks all sending** today: the plan returns `blocked = true`, `scheduled_count = 0`, and `governance_decision = "BLOCK"`, with a bilingual reason, until remediated. Degraded (non-blocking) health at week 4+ lowers the cap to 150 rather than blocking outright. Health monitoring and the deliverability rules live in [DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md](DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md) and [../../ops/EMAIL_DELIVERABILITY.md](../../ops/EMAIL_DELIVERABILITY.md).
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:53:ثلاثة أصناف ترفع `requires_suppression = true`: `unsubscribe`, `angry`, `bounce`. كل منها يُنشئ `SuppressionEntry` فورًا و`permanent = true`، فلا يُتواصَل مع المستلم مجددًا. الكبح يسري في موضعين: البوابة تحجب أي مسودة لمستلم مكبوح بـ `suppression_hit`، والمخطِّط يستبعده بنفس الكود (انظر [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) و[DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md](DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md)). أسباب الكبح في `records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:57:Three classes raise `requires_suppression = true`: `unsubscribe`, `angry`, `bounce`. Each creates a `SuppressionEntry` immediately, with `permanent = true`, so the recipient is never contacted again. Suppression applies in two places: the gate blocks any draft for a suppressed recipient as `suppression_hit`, and the planner excludes them on the same code (see [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) and [DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md](DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md)). Suppression reasons live in `records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:61:- **`positive` → اكتشاف:** الانتقال إلى مكالمة/واتساب يتطلّب موافقة المؤسس **وموافقة المستلم (consent)**؛ لا قناة خارجية بلا opt-in. سجّل الموافقة في `auto_client_acquisition/compliance_os/consent_ledger`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:68:- **`positive` → discovery:** moving to a call/WhatsApp requires founder approval **and recipient consent**; no external channel without opt-in. Record consent in `auto_client_acquisition/compliance_os/consent_ledger`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:7:التسليم إلى صندوق الوارد امتياز يُكتسب بالسمعة والامتثال. كل إرسال خارجي يتطلّب: موافقة المؤسس عبر `auto_client_acquisition/approval_center/`، رابط إلغاء اشتراك حاضرًا، ومرورًا عبر `auto_client_acquisition/safe_send_gateway/`. **المصدر مُدخَل من المؤسس أو عام فقط — لا scraping ولا قوائم مشتراة.** أي بحث عن شركة على LinkedIn يكون **manual LinkedIn company search (founder-approved per call)** فقط. الحجم محكوم بالمنحنى في [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md).
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:11:Inbox delivery is a privilege earned through reputation and compliance. Every external send requires: founder approval via `auto_client_acquisition/approval_center/`, a present unsubscribe link, and passage through `auto_client_acquisition/safe_send_gateway/`. **Data is founder-input or public only — no scraping, no purchased lists.** Any LinkedIn lookup is **manual LinkedIn company search (founder-approved per call)** only. Volume is governed by the curve in [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md).
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:29:| **SPF** | Declares who may send for the domain (`v=spf1 … -all`) |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:39:Start on personal Gmail at low limits, then move sending to a **separate domain you control** after the first paid pilots (see the two phases in [../../ops/EMAIL_DELIVERABILITY.md](../../ops/EMAIL_DELIVERABILITY.md)). Separation protects the company's primary domain from any reputation damage and keeps cold-send signals isolated from transactional mail. Warm-up follows the ramp curve, never a sudden jump.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:43:قواعد مرسِلي Google السائبة (تنطبق عند الحجوم الأعلى إلى صناديق المستهلكين): **List-Unsubscribe بنقرة واحدة (RFC 8058)** في كل إرسال، **معدل شكاوى سبام < 0.3%** (استهدف < 0.1%)، ومصادقة دومين قائمة (SPF/DKIM/DMARC). الدالة `auto_client_acquisition/email/deliverability_check.py` تفحص الجاهزية التشغيلية. أي حالة `unhealthy/bounce_spike/spam_warning` تحجب كل الإرسال في المخطِّط.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:47:Google's bulk sender rules (apply at higher volumes to consumer inboxes): **one-click List-Unsubscribe (RFC 8058)** on every send, **spam-complaint rate < 0.3%** (target < 0.1%), and standing domain authentication (SPF/DKIM/DMARC). `auto_client_acquisition/email/deliverability_check.py` checks operational readiness. Any `unhealthy/bounce_spike/spam_warning` state blocks all sending in the planner.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:51:البوابة `auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/draft_quality_gate.py` تُنفِّذ هذه القواعد كأكواد إخفاق:
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:55:| **لا عنوان مُضلِّل** | `misleading_subject` (أنماط سبام/أحرف كبيرة) + `fake_reply_prefix` (لا Re:/Fwd: في رسالة باردة) |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:56:| **خيار إلغاء واضح يُحترَم بسرعة** | `missing_unsubscribe` يحجب أي مسودة بلا opt-out؛ الإلغاء → كبح فوري |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:62:`auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/draft_quality_gate.py` enforces these as fail codes:
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:66:| **No misleading subject** | `misleading_subject` (spam patterns / ALL-CAPS) + `fake_reply_prefix` (no Re:/Fwd: on a cold message) |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:67:| **Clear opt-out, honored promptly** | `missing_unsubscribe` blocks any draft without an opt-out; unsubscribe → immediate suppression |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:73:قائمة الكبح قطعية. أسباب الكبح (`records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`): `unsubscribe`, `complaint`, `bounce`, `angry`, `manual`. أي ارتداد (bounce) أو شكوى أو طلب إلغاء أو رد غاضب → `SuppressionEntry` فورًا و`permanent = true`. المخطِّط في [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) يستبعد أي `recipient_ref` مكبوح بـ `suppression_hit`، والبوابة تحجب المسودة بنفس الكود. منطق تصنيف الردود وتوليد الكبح في [REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md](REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md) و`auto_client_acquisition/email/reply_classifier.py`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:77:The suppression list is absolute. Suppression reasons (`records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`): `unsubscribe`, `complaint`, `bounce`, `angry`, `manual`. Any bounce, complaint, unsubscribe, or angry reply → a `SuppressionEntry` immediately, with `permanent = true`. The planner in [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) excludes any suppressed `recipient_ref` as `suppression_hit`, and the gate blocks the draft on the same code. Reply classification and suppression generation live in [REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md](REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md) and `auto_client_acquisition/email/reply_classifier.py`.

.\docs\governance\PDPL_DATA_RULES.md:1:# PDPL Data Rules
.\docs\governance\PDPL_DATA_RULES.md:14:Processing of personal data requires a valid basis under PDPL and implementing regulations — commonly **consent**, **contract performance**, **legitimate interest** (where applicable and balanced), or **publicly available data from a lawful public source** when criteria are met. .\docs\whatsapp\WHATSAPP_SECURITY_PRIVACY_AR.md:17:ما يُكتشف ويُحجب (من `whatsapp_policy_guard.py`): مفاتيح OpenAI/Anthropic، مفاتيح AWS، رموز HubSpot، رموز Bearer، الرموز الطويلة العامة، وأي صيغة `key/secret/token/password/كلمة السر/المفتاح = ...`. القيمة المكتشفة **لا تُعاد ولا تُسجَّل أبدًا**.

.\docs\commercial\launch_kit\01_linkedin_launch_posts.md:35:I founded it because many B2B companies have real opportunities leaking away — not because they do not work hard, but because follow-up, priorities, and decisions are scattered across WhatsApp, Excel, and the founder's memory. .\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:1:# PDPL Data Subject Request (DSAR) SOP — Dealix
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:6:**Companion docs:** `docs/PRIVACY_PDPL_READINESS.md` · `docs/DPA_PILOT_TEMPLATE.md` · `docs/LEGAL_ENGAGEMENT.md` · `landing/privacy.html` · Plan §23.5.5
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:8:> **Why this doc exists:** Saudi PDPL grants data subjects rights to access, correct, delete, restrict processing, and port their data. Failure to respond within statutory deadlines = enforcement action (48 SDAIA decisions issued 2025-2026, fines up to 5,000,000 SAR per breach).
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:14:## 1. PDPL data subject rights (per nDMO + Articles 16-22 PDPL)
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:26:> **Critical:** SDAIA enforcement window is 5 days for response when SDAIA itself initiates investigation. Statutory 30-day window is for direct subject requests.
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:34:- **Controller customer's end-users** (e.g., real-estate office's own clients whose data is processed by Dealix) → Dealix is **Processor**
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:35:- **Direct prospects / leads to Dealix** (people Dealix's pipelines have processed) → Dealix is **Controller**
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:43:| Dealix's prospect / lead | Founder direct | Controller (own response) |

.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:59:**Never refuse a DSAR for using the wrong channel.** Acknowledge any channel within 24 hours, redirect to email for documentation.
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:73:  "received_via": "email | whatsapp | postal | form",
.\docs\PDPL_DATA_SUBJECT_REQUEST_SOP.md:88:> «شكراً [الاسم]. استلمت طلبك حسب نظام حماية البيانات الشخصيّة (PDPL). سأتحقّق من هويّتك خلال ٧ أيّام، ثم أرد عليك خلال ٣٠ يوم من تاريخ استلام الطلب الكامل ([تاريخ]). لو احتجت معلومات إضافيّة لتسريع العمليّة، سأتواصل معك. شكرًا لثقتك.»

.\docs\ops\INCIDENT_RESPONSE_QUICKCARD.md:37:## 3. Customer notification (PDPL Article 21) — إبلاغ العميل
.\docs\ops\INCIDENT_RESPONSE_QUICKCARD.md:47:The 72-hour clock starts at confirmation, not at first suspicion. The triage note distinguishes the two timestamps explicitly. If suspicion lasts more than 24 hours without confirmation, the founder writes a "pre-notification" courtesy note to the affected customer, even when no PDPL clock has started — it costs trust to be silent during a long triage.
.\docs\ops\INCIDENT_RESPONSE_QUICKCARD.md:66:**SDAIA reporting threshold:** if PDPL Article 21 reporting thresholds are met, the founder files with SDAIA in parallel to customer notification, not after. Placeholder: `<SDAIA reporting portal URL and account>`.
